kirundi.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: ni aho abantu benshi batangirira — intoki ziruhukira kuri a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
kirundi.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: . Font ya dyslexia, ibimenyetso vy'ijwi, high-contrast, keyboard ifite utubuto twagutse, n'ibindi — ni vyo bidandazwa ubwavyo, si uburyo bwo gusubiraho.
kirundi.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Nta timer, nta marushanwa, nta bihano vya streak. Genda ku muvuduko wawe. Hagarara igihe cyose.
kirundi.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: — AI yandika inyandiko y'imyimenyerezo ku rwego rw'ishure ryawe ku kintu cyose ukunda. Fungura
kirundi.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: birashobora guhinduka — umurongo w'amabara hejuru uhindura hagati ya theme 5. Canke ukande
kirundi.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Umuganga canke umwigisha ashobora gushyiraho intego ya IEP no gusohora iterambere kuva kuri
kirundi.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Iminsi itandukanye ya kalendari ifite nibura session imwe mu minsi 30 ishize. Nta cyaha ku minsi yo kuruhuka.
kirundi.e_g_week_4_spelling_list_iep_sight_wor: urugero, "Urutonde rwa spelling rw'indwi ya 4", "Amagambo yo kuraba ya IEP"
kirundi.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Andika canke umanike inyandiko. Inyuguti zisanzwe, imibare, n'ibimenyetso bisanzwe vy'inyandiko nivyo bikora neza kurusha.
kirundi.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — iyi session ntizabikwa. Nta gahato, nta nyandiko.
kirundi.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Canke ukande Space canke Enter kugira ngo utangire. Kanda Esc igihe cyose muri drill kugira ngo usohoke.
kirundi.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Inyandiko zitari iz'Icyongereza zikoresha ASCII gusa (nta accent / tilde) kugira ngo utubuto twa keyboard tusanzwe tugume ari yo ntego y'imyimenyerezo.
kirundi.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: urugero, ikirere, imbwa, Minecraft, inyanja, imbeho ya Maine
kirundi.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Amatsinda y'inyandiko yanditswe n'intoki akora nta AI. Inyandiko zinjijwe zinjira muri library yawe; inyandiko imwe buri ndwi ni urufatiro rukwiye kurushaho ku iterambere rya IEP kuruta inyandiko yongeye gukorwa.
kirundi.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Inyandiko zakozwe vuba. Kora drill y'iyo ari yo yose kugira ngo wongere uyikoreshe. Iya kera cane isohoka iyo ukoze iya 9.
kirundi.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Nta nyandiko yashyizwemo kuri iyi drill.
kirundi.pace_over_time_10_second_buckets: Umuvuduko mu gihe · uduseke twa segonde 10
kirundi.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Buri kadomo = inyuguti zanditswe mu idirishya rya segonde 10. Shyira imbeba hejuru kugira ngo urabe WPM iyi n'iyi.
kirundi.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Igisubizo cyawe gifasha abigisha kubona igihe imibare itavuga inkuru yose.
kirundi.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Iyi session yagenze ite? "Natangiye buhoro, nakomeje, nakoresheje slow-motion mode..."
kirundi.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Inyandiko yabitswe kuri iyi session. Izagaragara muri raporo ya IEP no mu gusohora CSV.
kirundi.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Noza ifoto ya nyuma ukoresheje image-to-image aho gutangira bushya
kirundi.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Kuramo iyi foto nka dosiye ya PNG
kirundi.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Ongera ugerageze inyandiko imwe kugira ngo utsinde amanota yawe
kirundi.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Yerekana inyandiko yose muri izi segonde mbere y'uko kwandika bitangira. Ifasha abanyeshure bungukirwa no gusoma mbere, hanyuma bakandika. Umunyeshure ashobora gusimbuka kubara igihe cyose.
kirundi.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Nyuma y'iyi minota yo kwandika nyako (igihe cyo guhagarara ntikibarwa), erekana kwibutsa gutuje ko waruhuka. Bibaho rimwe kuri buri drill. Vyazimijwe mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Hindura isura yose y'igikoresho. High-contrast mode isumba theme. Kawaii ni theme y'urumuri; izindi ni ubwoko bw'umwijima.
kirundi.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Hindura ibara ry'ibanze rikoreshwa ku nyuguti iriho, utubuto, n'ibimenyetso vy'ingenzi. Ku banyeshure babona ubururu bukonje cane canke bashaka amabara ashyushye kugira ngo bibande. High-contrast mode isumba ibi.
kirundi.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Hitamo inyandiko za drill ngufi canke ndende. "Ngufi" ifasha abanyeshure bafite ikibazo cyo kwibanda canke umunaniro; "Ndende" ni ku banyeshure bubaka kwihangana. Niba drill idafite sample ihuye n'icyo wahisemo, isubira kuri iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Akadomo gatuje gatera ku kimenyetso cya drill kerekana injyana ihamye. NTA gihano ku kugenda buhoro — iki ni icyitegererezo, si igihe ntarengwa. Gifasha gutegura imikorere y'umubiri. Vyazimijwe mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Uyu ni umwanya wawe. Kuki ukora imyimenyerezo? Intego yawe y'uyu munsi ni iyihe? Itandukanye n'intego ya IEP y'umuganga.
kirundi.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: urugero, "Kwandika biragoye ubu, ariko nzashobora kwandika inkuru zanjye bwite." · "Nshaka kohereza nyogokuru email nta mama umfasha." · "Kwandika vuba = igihe gito cy'umukoro wo mu rugo."
kirundi.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Intego y'uyu munsi ni iyawe — ntibarwa kuri wowe niba utayigezeho. Isubira bushya mu buryo bwikora ejo.
kirundi.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Shyiraho intego y'ubwoko bwa IEP hano. Igaragara ku kimenyetso cya drill kandi yuzuza raporo y'iterambere mbere. Ikenewe gusa niba ukora inyandiko zemewe z'iterambere.
kirundi.e_g_j_d_initials_only_ferpa_safe: urugero, J.D. (inyuguti z'ibanze gusa, umutekano wa FERPA)
kirundi.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Koresha inyuguti z'ibanze canke izina ry'ubuhimbano — AlloFlow yagenewe kuguma ifite umutekano wa FERPA.
kirundi.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: urugero, Akunda home-row na keyboard ifite utubuto twagutse; gabanya amakosa mbere yo kongera umuvuduko.
kirundi.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Bika accommodations + intego ya IEP + theme y'ijwi kuri JSON, canke ushyiremo profile ivuye ku bundi buryo. NTIBIKOPA amateka ya session — ayo agumana buri munyeshuri.
kirundi.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Backup yuzuye irimo session, amanota meza cane, ubuhanga, ikarita y'amakosa, na library zombi — inyandiko yose y'umunyeshure. Koresha iyi mbere yo gusiba amakuru ya browser canke guhindura ibikoresho.
kirundi.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Inzira yawe bwite y'ikura. Nta kugereranywa na bagenzi bawe — uyu ni wowe gusa, mu gihe.
kirundi.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Bigira ingaruka ku ihinduka, raporo, CSV. Igiti cy'ubumenyi kiguma cy'igihe cyose.
kirundi.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Ongeraho canke uhindure inyandiko. Ibika iyo usohotse canke na Ctrl+Enter.
kirundi.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Δ y'icyatsi = kwiyongera · umutuku = gusubira inyuma · imvi = nta gucira urubanza (igihe, umubare wa accommodations).
kirundi.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Utubuto tw'amakosa menshi kuri buri drill · igihe cyose
kirundi.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill zitandukanye zigaragaza intege nke zitandukanye. Koresha ibi mu guhitamo drill zibanda ku tubuto tw'ibibazo vyihariye.
kirundi.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Izi zishimira kugerageza accommodations — si ukuzihisha. Gukoresha ibigufasha ni imbaraga, si intege nke.
kirundi.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Impuzandengo ya WPM buri accommodation ifunguye vs ifunze. Igiteranyo mu bwoko bwose bwa drill — ivangwa rya drill rishobora kuyobya, bityo koresha igabanywa rya buri drill muri raporo hepfo ku vyemezo vy'ingenzi.
kirundi.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Kanda raporo kugira ngo uhitemo vyose, canke ukoreshe utubuto hepfo.
kirundi.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Andukura incamake y'interuro 2-4 mu rurimi rworoshye ku email y'umubyeyi
kirundi.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Uzuza drill yawe ya mbere kugira ngo urabe urufatiro rwawe, ihinduka, na raporo ya IEP hano.
kirundi.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Nta session ihuye na filter iriho.
kirundi.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Genda hagati y'amakarita ya drill n'utubuto two kugendagenda
kirundi.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Subiramo drill yawe ya nyuma (gusimbuka vuba)
kirundi.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Ibintu vyose muri Imyimenyerezo yo Kwandika bishobora kugerwaho na keyboard — vyagenewe abakoresha screen-reader na accommodations zo gutegura imikorere y'umubiri.
kirundi.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Ibihinduka vya accommodations ku kimenyetso cy'intangiriro ya drill bishobora kugerwaho vyuzuye na keyboard binyuze kuri Tab — nta mouse ikenewe ku gice icyo ari cyo cyose cy'iki gikoresho.
kirundi.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Ubwoko bw'umukino bwo guhitamo. Amagambo azamuka avuye hasi; andika ijambo ryo hejuru kugira ngo urisibe. Iyo umurundo ugeze ku gisenge umukino urarangira. Nta leaderboard, nta cyaha cya streak — ni amanota meza cane gusa.
kirundi.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Buri theme ifite mascot igaragara ku kibuga cy'umukino, kuri menu, no ku kimenyetso cy'incamake. Basubiza ivyo ukora — combo, akaga, igitero, ibitotsi, gutsinda, gutsindwa.
kirundi.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Hitamo ijambo ry'igitero ryo kohereza kuri bot
kirundi.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ IGITERO CYITEGUYE — hitamo ijambo ryo kohereza
kirundi.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Kanda ikarita CANKE ukande 1 / 2 / 3 kugira ngo wohereze. Kanda Esc kugira ngo usimbuke kandi utohereze. Umurundo wawe warakonje mu gihe uhitamo.
kirundi.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Vyahagaritswe — imirundo yombi yarakonje. Kanda Komeza canke Esc kugira ngo ukomeze.
kirundi.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Ubaka urufatiro. Buhoro + neza bitsinda vuba + nabi.
kirundi.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Iterambere rihamye. Komeza urwego rwo hasi rw'ukuri.
kirundi.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Umuvuduko + ukuri mu rwego rutanga umusaruro. Imyimenyerezo irambye.
kirundi.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM yo hejuru yagezweho. Inyungu iragabanuka ku muvuduko.
kirundi.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Umuvuduko warenze ingengo y'ukuri. Subira ku ntego yo buhoro.
kirundi.wpm_accuracy_tradeoff_discovery: ⚡ Kuvumbura imiterere hagati ya WPM n'ukuri
kirundi.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Slider eshanu zihindura intego y'imyimenyerezo yawe. Widget ishyira agace kawe muri kimwe mu bihe 5 bitandukanye kandi ishushanya Pareto frontier ya WPM-ukuri. Nta manota ku bihinduka vyawe — ubushakashatsi buri mu gushaka ahantu h'imyimenyerezo irambye.
kirundi.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = ukuri kwiza cane gushobora kugerwaho kuri buri WPM. Hejuru = ntibishoboka; hepfo = hari umwanya wo gukura.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Igitekerezo (inyandiko yisanzuye): Intego yawe irambye ni iyihe? Urwego rwo hasi rw'ukuri ruhindura rute WPM nyayo?
kirundi.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Shyira WPM=80, ukuri=98. Birashoboka? Gereranya n'ikimenyetso cy'agace kawe.
kirundi.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Manura urwego rwo hasi rw'ukuri kugera kuri 80%. Ese WPM nyayo irazamuka?
kirundi.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Abahanga bakomeza 95%+ kuri WPM 70+. Rondera inzira z'amahugurwa zigera aho.
kirundi.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Intego yo buhoro ifite ukuri kwinshi ishobora gutanga inyandiko nyinshi kuri buri session. Gerageza.
kirundi.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Numva imiterere — sobanura mu magambo yawe
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Sobanura mu magambo yawe: WPM, ukuri, n'imbaraga z'imikorere bikorana bite? Pareto frontier isobanura iki ku myitozo yo kwandika?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'utuce 5 dutandukanye; Pareto curve yerekana umwanya w'imiterere; nta ntego "nyayo" — vyagenewe gutyo.
